entities.name: RHIZOBIA
entities.description: Bacteria that nodulate haricot bean and were studied for phenotypic characteristics and symbiotic effectiveness

entities.name: HARICOT BEAN
entities.description: Phaseolus vulgaris L., the host plant for the studied rhizobia

entities.name: SOUTHERN ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the haricot bean and rhizobia were sampled

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental factor tested for rhizobia tolerance

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: Environmental factor tested for rhizobia tolerance

entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: Environmental factor tested for rhizobia tolerance

entities.name: HEAVY METALS
entities.description: Environmental factor tested for rhizobia tolerance

entities.name: ANTIBIOTICS
entities.description: Chemical agents tested for rhizobia tolerance

entities.name: SYMBIOTIC EFFECTIVENESS
entities.description: The ability of rhizobia to form a symbiotic relationship with the host plant

entities.name: CULTURAL CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Growth characteristics of the rhizobia isolates in culture

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in physiological traits among the tested rhizobia isolates

entities.name: NUMERICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical approach used to analyze phenotypic characteristics of the isolates

entities.name: NUMERICAL TAXONOMIC APPROACH
entities.description: The theoretical basis for the numerical analysis performed

entities.name: UPGMA
entities.description: Unweighted Pair Group Method with Average algorithm used for clustering isolates

entities.name: NTSYSPC21
entities.description: Software package used to implement the UPGMA algorithm

entities.name: DIVERSITY GROUPS
entities.description: The five major groups (I-V) and group U identified through numerical analysis

entities.name: RHIZOBIUM
entities.description: A genus of rhizobia associated with diversity groups I-IV

entities.name: ENSIFER
entities.description: A genus of rhizobia associated with diversity groups I-IV

entities.name: MESORHIZOBIUM
entities.description: A genus of rhizobia associated with diversity groups I-IV

entities.name: CARBON AND AMINO ACID SOURCE
entities.description: Nutrients utilized by the rhizobia isolates

entities.name: INOCULATION TRIALS
entities.description: Tests to evaluate the potential of identified isolates for plant inoculation
